title: lapathum × acutum
intro: Lapathum × acutum, also known as meadow sweet or meadowsweet, is a hybrid of Lapathum and acuta, belonging to the rose family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of meadowsweet include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has also been used in the production of herbal remedies such as meadowsweet syrup and meadowsweet oil.
